LanguageData.Ammo_473x33mmCaseless_FMJ.label: 4.73x33mm Caseless (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_473x33mmCaseless_FMJ.description: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile.

LanguageData.Ammo_473x33mmCaseless_Incendiary.descrip: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile.

LanguageData.Ammo_473x33mmCaseless_HE.description: Caseless bullet with a solid propellant enveloping the projectile.
